allow: Bash(python -c "from scipy.spatial import cKDTree; import numpy as np; pts = np.random.rand\(500,3\); tree = cKDTree\(pts\); pairs = tree.query_pairs\(0.05, output_type=''ndarray''\); print\(''scipy OK, pairs shape:'', pairs.shape\)")

Bash(python -c "from scipy.spatial import cKDTree; import numpy as np; pts = np.random.rand\(500,3\).astype\(np.float64\); tree = cKDTree\(pts\); pairs = tree.query_pairs\(0.05, output_type=''ndarray''\); print\(''scipy OK, pairs shape:'', pairs.shape\)")
